signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Beating Prior Months But Missing 2.4% Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, according to data released around April 2, 2026—marking the most recent confirmed figure available as of April 18, 2026.[1][6] This print was below market expectation
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
